headline: EQR Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Mark Parrell: Thank you, Marty.  2025 was a challenging year for the rental housing industry, including Equity Residential.  In many of our coastal markets, we saw stronger-than-expected rental growth through the first half of the year, followed by a deceleration in revenue momentum through the latter part of the year across all of our markets, except San Francisco and New York notable bright spots that we expect to continue to deliver strong results in 2026.

raw.headline: EQR Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
